competitions.product_info: Chrono Win Competitions How it works Winners 0 Collectors Watch Competition Win This Tudor Monarch Time Left to End: 1 Days 21 Hrs 38 Mins 39 Secs 8.33% SOLD 550/600 Tickets Remaining Enter Now winners Year: 2026 Box and papers: Original box and papers included Collectors Watch Competition - Guaranteed Winners - Transparent Draws End Date: July 12, 2026 10:00 pm - Draw Date: 12/07/2026 10:30PM Collectors Watch Competition Win a Tudor Monarch TUDOR Monarch ref. M2639W1A0U-0001 — a brand-new 2026 release and one of TUDOR’s most interesting modern collector pieces. This example features the distinctive dark champagne-colour dial with applied Roman and Arabic hour markers, a finely faceted 39mm stainless steel case, polished and satin finishes, sapphire crystal, 100m water resistance and a two-link faceted steel bracelet with TUDOR’s excellent “T-fit” clasp. From a collector’s perspective, the Monarch is significant because it is not simply another Black Bay variation. It marks TUDOR revisiting one of its historic lines with a much more refined, design-led execution. The papyrus-toned dial, sharp case geometry and unusual numeral layout give it a very different character within the modern TUDOR catalogue. Inside is the Manufacture Calibre MT5662-2U, a self-winding mechanical movement with COSC and METAS certification, a 65-hour power reserve and high-grade finishing visible through the display case back. This gives the Monarch proper modern technical credibility while still carrying a strong vintage-inspired identity. Year: 2026 Condition: Brand new / unworn Box and papers: Original box and papers included A rare opportunity to enter for a first-year TUDOR Monarch — a watch that feels far more collector-focused than a standard daily sports model, combining TUDOR’s centenary design language with modern manufacture movement quality. This example is in excellent, unpolished condition with a pristine “Mk 3” dial . #32 - The Cartier Paris Tank Louis 78086 18k Solid Gold The History— The Example The Cartier Tank Louis is one of the defining wristwatch designs of the last century. First introduced in 1922 as a refinement of the original Tank, the Tank Louis established the elegant proportions that have come to define Cartier, and has been worn by artists, royalty and cultural icons ever since. This reference, the 78086 , is one of the most desirable vintage iterations. Crafted in 18k solid yellow gold , it features the highly sought-after Paris-signed dial , a detail that collectors have long admired for its rarity and historical significance. This particular watch is presented in excellent, unpolished condition , retaining crisp case lines and a pristine Mk 3 dial . The beautifully balanced proportions make it equally elegant on both men and women, wearing with the understated sophistication that has made the Tank Louis such an enduring classic.
